column1: For those nervous about an unexpected "hard right turn", don't be. Now that there's a well-defined center of circulation, the models will have a pretty easy job. No changes to impact on our area. The updated NHC track will come out around five.

: Actually, that's not possible. You see, and penguin has more of a waddle than a walk. Also, in the climate most ice cream shops are located, the penguin and the polar bear wouldn't be within the vicinity of an ice cream shop. I also might want to add that the lactose is not good for the penguin nor the bears digestive system. The milk is hard to process, and may cause bloating, making it very uncomfortable. Now this may not be a problem for the bear, as he is a natural predator and can handle his own.
